label: SCAM
text: Main CBI Special Branch se Deputy Inspector Mehta bol raha hoon. Aapke Aadhaar number se ek hawala network link mila hai. Abhi digital arrest mein hain aap, 3 ghante ke andar 6 lakh rupaye RBI safe account mein transfer karo warna physical arrest hogi. Kisi ko mat batana, phone mat kaatna.

label: SCAM
text: This is Inspector Rawat from CBI cybercrime division. Your bank account has been flagged for money laundering worth 42 lakh rupees. You are under digital surveillance right now. To avoid immediate arrest, transfer 5 lakh rupees to our secure escrow account within 2 hours. Do not contact your family or lawyer.

label: SCAM
text: Aap is waqt digital arrest mein hain. CBI ne aapke naam par drug trafficking ka case register kiya hai. Court ne non-bailable warrant issue kiya hai. Abhi 90 minutes mein 10 lakh rupaye transfer karo. Agar phone kaata ya kisi ko bataya toh ED ki team aapke ghar pahunch jayegi.

label: SCAM
text: Hello, I am calling from CBI headquarters New Delhi. We have intercepted illegal transactions of 28 lakh rupees linked to your PAN card. A non-bailable warrant is ready. To settle this matter and avoid public arrest, deposit 7 lakh rupees immediately. Share your account details for verification. Stay on the line.

label: SCAM
text: Yeh BESCOM electricity department ki taraf se urgent notice hai. Aapka bijli connection aaj raat 8 baje permanently cut kar diya jayega unpaid dues ki wajah se. Abhi 2400 rupaye is UPI number par transfer karo. Confirmation ke liye apna meter number aur registered mobile OTP share karein.

label: SCAM
text: This is an automated alert from your electricity provider. Your account shows overdue payment of 4800 rupees. Your power supply will be disconnected in 30 minutes. To avoid disconnection please pay immediately by sharing your debit card number and CVV. Our engineer is standing by.

label: SCAM
text: Main MSEB se bol raha hoon sir. Aapke bijli bill mein irregularity mili hai aur account flag hua hai. 45 minute mein connection cut ho jayega. Turant 3200 rupaye is Google Pay number par bhejo aur screenshot hamare WhatsApp par bhejo. OTP bhi share karna padega verification ke liye.

label: SCAM
text: This is Mumbai International Airport Customs. We have seized a parcel addressed to you containing 500 grams of cocaine and forged government documents. An FIR has been registered. To avoid criminal prosecution and public humiliation, pay a clearance bond of 75,000 rupees immediately via NEFT. Share your full bank details now.

label: SCAM
text: Delhi customs se call kar raha hoon. Aapke naam ka ek parcel Chennai port par pakda gaya hai jisme synthetic drugs aur fake currency thi. Interpol ne bhi notice liya hai. Case close karne ke liye 1 lakh rupaye ka bond bharein abhi. AnyDesk download karein aur code share karein taaki document verify ho sake.

label: SCAM
text: This is DHL customs clearance officer. Your international parcel from Dubai has been held at IGI Airport. It contains prohibited items and a criminal complaint has been filed against your Aadhaar. Pay 60,000 rupees as surety bond immediately or face arrest. Stay on call and do not tell anyone.

label: SCAM
text: Aapka HDFC bank account 2 ghante mein permanently freeze ho raha hai kyunki aapne KYC update nahi ki. RBI directive ke under abhi apna PAN, Aadhaar number, aur net banking password share karein. Ek OTP aayega use bhi share karein. Agar nahi kiya toh account hamesha ke liye band ho jayega.

label: SCAM
text: This is an urgent message from Axis Bank compliance team. Your account shows incomplete KYC and will be frozen in 60 minutes as per RBI guidelines. To prevent this, share your 16-digit card number, ATM PIN, and OTP sent to your registered mobile. Our officer is waiting.

label: SCAM
text: Aapke Punjab National Bank account mein suspicious activity detect hui hai. Account freeze hone se bachane ke liye abhi call par bane rahe aur apna Aadhaar number, PAN card details, aur net banking ka username password share karein. OTP kabhi bhi share nahi karna chahiye — isliye hum khud check karenge.

label: SCAM
text: Congratulations! Your mobile number was randomly selected in KBC Season 15 lucky draw. You have won 35 lakh rupees and a Maruti Swift car. To claim your prize, pay a 20,000 rupee processing and GST fee via PhonePe to this number. Do not share this news until the cheque arrives.

label: SCAM
text: Aapka number KBC jackpot mein select hua hai. Aap 50 lakh rupaye jeet chuke hain. Amitabh Bachchan ji ke show mein aapka naam announce hoga. Prize release ke liye abhi 25,000 rupaye processing fee bhejein is account mein. Ek OTP aayega use share karein. Kisi ko mat batana abhi.

label: SCAM
text: Hello, this is Windows technical support department. We detected a critical virus on your computer that is actively sending your banking passwords to hackers in China. You must download AnyDesk immediately and give us remote access so we can remove the threat. Your bank account will be emptied in 20 minutes if we don't act now.

label: SCAM
text: Main Microsoft India support center se bol raha hoon. Aapke laptop se 847 illegal connections detect hue hain. Aapka IP address dark web par list hua hai. TeamViewer download karein aur ID share karein. 500 rupaye ka protection fee bhi lagega. Abhi nahi kiya toh police complaint ho sakti hai.

label: SCAM
text: This is Apple iCloud security team. Your account has been breached and your personal photos and banking apps are being accessed right now from Russia. Call back on this number immediately and allow us screen share access to secure your device. This is your final warning before your account is permanently suspended.

label: SCAM
text: Income Tax Department Bangalore se call kar raha hoon. Aapka 1,20,000 rupaye ka tax refund process mein hai lekin aapki form 16 details mismatch hai. Refund cancel na ho isliye abhi Aadhaar number, PAN, aur bank IFSC code share karein. Aaj last date hai, kal refund expire ho jayega.

label: SCAM
text: This call is from Income Tax helpdesk. You are eligible for a refund of 67,500 rupees for the assessment year 2023-24. Due to a technical error your refund is stuck. To process it immediately, verify your bank account by sharing your account number, IFSC, and the OTP we just sent. Offer expires today.

label: SCAM
text: This is an automated TRAI notification. Your mobile number has been reported for sending 500 spam messages and will be permanently blocked in 45 minutes. Press 1 now to speak with a TRAI officer and pay a 1500 rupee reactivation penalty. Do not disconnect or your number will be blacklisted immediately.

label: SCAM
text: TRAI ke records mein aapka number illegal activity ke liye flag hua hai. Ek ghante mein SIM permanently block ho jayegi. Block hone se bachane ke liye abhi 1800 rupaye is UPI par bhejein aur Aadhaar number share karein officer se verification ke liye. Phone mat kaatna.

label: SCAM
text: Aap Supreme Court ke digital arrest order ke under hain. Aapke naam se 18 fraudulent bank accounts khule hain. ED aur CBI dono case dekh rahi hain. Agle 4 ghante mein 3 lakh rupaye cryptocurrency wallet mein transfer karein. Ghar se bahar mat jaiye, kisi se baat mat kariye.

label: SCAM
text: This is Supreme Court bailiff office. A contempt of court order has been issued against you for non-compliance with a financial directive. You are under digital house arrest. Transfer 4 lakh rupees to the court registry account within 3 hours to avoid physical custody. Inform no one.

label: SCAM
text: Main LIC Zonal Office Lucknow se bol raha hoon. Aapki policy number 987654321 mature ho gayi hai aur 6.8 lakh rupaye bonus ke saath aapko milna hai. Claim process ke liye 12,000 rupaye GST aur documentation fee abhi PhonePe par bhejein. Offer sirf aaj valid hai, kal expire ho jayega.

label: SCAM
text: Hello sir, your Star Health insurance policy has a special no-claim bonus of 3.2 lakh rupees. To transfer this amount to your account we need your policy number, Aadhaar, PAN, and bank details. Also a processing fee of 5500 rupees is required immediately. Please don't delay as this bonus expires tonight.

label: SCAM
text: Congratulations! You have been selected for the post of Junior Engineer in Indian Railways after your online application. Monthly salary 52,000 rupees with government benefits. To confirm your appointment, deposit a 15,000 rupee security deposit in this SBI account today. Appointment letter will be sent via email. Tell no other candidates.

label: SCAM
text: Aapka UPSC/SSC merit list mein selection hua hai. Joining letter bhejne se pehle 8,000 rupaye uniform aur training material fee ke roop mein jama karni hogi. Abhi NEFT karein is account mein aur receipt WhatsApp par bhejein. Kisi ko nahi batana jab tak official letter na aaye.

label: SCAM
text: Hi sweetheart, I have been earning very well from this crypto trading platform. My uncle taught me the strategy. You just invest 15,000 rupees to start and within a week you can make 80,000. I will help you set it up. Share your UPI PIN so I can configure your wallet. Keep it secret from your family for now.

label: SCAM
text: Dear friend, I recently moved to Singapore and started trading on a special platform only available here. Last month I earned 5 lakh profit. I want to help you too. Download this app and invest 20,000 rupees. Share your OTP when you register so I can link our accounts. Do not show this to anyone yet.

label: SCAM
text: Main Cyber Crime Police Station se SI Prakash bol raha hoon. Aapke mobile number se 83 fraudulent UPI transactions hue hain. Aapke khilaf IPC 420 under FIR registered ho chuki hai. Arrest se bachne ke liye 40,000 rupaye fine abhi is account mein bhejein. Apna Aadhaar aur bank details bhi share karein.

label: SCAM
text: This is Mumbai Cyber Police. Your WhatsApp account was used to send death threats to a politician. A non-bailable FIR has been filed against you. To prevent arrest today, pay a 30,000 rupee bail surety via online transfer immediately. Bring no one with you to the station or face remand.

label: SCAM
text: Main Enforcement Directorate officer hoon. Aapke naam se benami properties aur shell company links mile hain. 2 lakh rupaye ka PMLA case registered hai. Abhi 80,000 rupaye compliance fee bharo warna aaj raat ko ghar se pakad lenge. Kisi advocate ko mat batana, yeh confidential matter hai.

label: SCAM
text: This is Enforcement Directorate Ahmedabad. We have evidence of 15 lakh rupees in illegal foreign exchange transactions linked to your Aadhaar. You will be arrested under FEMA unless you cooperate. Transfer 2 lakh rupees as provisional settlement amount before 6 PM today. Do not consult anyone.

label: SCAM
text: NCB se call kar raha hoon. Aapka naam ek interstate drug trafficking case mein aaya hai. Aapke address par raid hone wali hai. Raid rokne ke liye abhi 1.5 lakh rupaye transfer karein is account mein. Apna Aadhaar scan karke WhatsApp par bhejein. Ghar ke kisi aur ko mat batana.

label: SCAM
text: Hello, this is Narcotics Control Bureau officer speaking. Your parcel from Thailand was found to contain MDMA. Your name and address have been formally recorded. Pay 90,000 rupees as penalty to close this case before we file a chargesheet. Download TeamViewer and share your screen for document processing.

label: SCAM
text: Main Passport Seva Kendra se bol raha hoon. Aapki passport application mein discrepancy mili hai aur application reject hone wali hai. Reject hone se bachane ke liye 3,500 rupaye processing fee abhi bhejein is link par. Aadhaar OTP bhi share karein verification ke liye. Aaj last chance hai.

label: SCAM
text: This is Regional Passport Office helpdesk. Your passport renewal has been flagged due to a mismatch in your date of birth records. To expedite processing and avoid cancellation, pay an urgent clearance fee of 4,200 rupees immediately. Share your Aadhaar number and OTP to verify identity.

label: SCAM
text: Main aapke SBI branch manager Sharma ji bol raha hoon. Aapke account mein ek suspicious transaction 2 lakh ka aai hai jo hum reverse karna chahte hain. Lekin aapko abhi apna ATM PIN aur OTP share karna hoga taaki hum transaction rok sakein. Turant share karein warna paisa chala jayega.

label: SCAM
text: Hello, I am the branch manager of ICICI Bank Andheri. We noticed an unauthorized transaction of 85,000 rupees attempted on your account. To block it immediately share your card number, CVV, and the OTP you receive. This is very urgent, we have only a 5-minute window to stop this.

label: SCAM
text: Main RBI Digital Currency Department se bol raha hoon. Sarkar ne ek special e-Rupee bonus scheme launch ki hai. Aap 50,000 e-Rupee ke liye eligible hain. Claim karne ke liye 2,000 rupaye registration fee bhejein aur Aadhaar OTP share karein. Scheme aaj raat 12 baje close ho rahi hai.

label: SCAM
text: This is RBI notification. As part of India's digital currency rollout, your account has been pre-selected for a 1 lakh e-Rupee credit. To activate this, complete KYC by sharing your Aadhaar, PAN, and a 500 rupee activation fee via UPI. Deadline is midnight tonight.

label: SCAM
text: UIDAI se urgent notice. Aapka Aadhaar card 3 ghante mein suspend hone wala hai kyunki kisi ne aapka Aadhaar use karke 5 SIM cards activate kiye hain. Suspend hone se bachane ke liye abhi apna Aadhaar number, linked mobile OTP, aur 1000 rupaye reactivation fee bhejein.

label: SCAM
text: This is UIDAI helpline. Your Aadhaar biometrics have been compromised and your card will be deactivated in 2 hours. To lock your biometrics and prevent misuse, share your 12-digit Aadhaar number and the OTP sent to your mobile with our security officer right now.

label: SCAM
text: Hamare paas aapki ek private video call ki recording hai jo kuch din pehle hui thi. Agar 50,000 rupaye abhi transfer nahi kiye toh yeh video aapke sabhi WhatsApp contacts aur Facebook friends par share kar denge. Paisa bhejne ke baad recording delete kar denge. Abhi decide karein.

label: SCAM
text: We have recordings of your recent video call that could destroy your reputation. We will send it to your employer and family unless you pay 80,000 rupees in Bitcoin within 1 hour. This is your only chance to make this go away quietly. Do not go to police or we release everything immediately.

label: SCAM
text: Main District Court bailiff office se bol raha hoon. Aapke khilaf cheque bounce case mein Rs 2,40,000 ka decree pass hua hai. Kal subah aapki property attach hogi. Abhi 70,000 rupaye settlement amount bhejein aur case withdraw ho jayega. Court ki seal wala notice WhatsApp par aa jayega.

label: SCAM
text: This is the office of Additional Sessions Judge. A civil recovery decree of 3.5 lakh rupees has been passed against you in absentia. Bailiffs will arrive at your residence tomorrow. To stay enforcement, transfer 1 lakh rupees as security deposit immediately to the court account provided.

label: SCAM
text: Sir, I am calling from CoinEarth investment platform. Our AI trading bot gives 40% monthly returns guaranteed. Over 10,000 investors already enrolled. Minimum investment is 30,000 rupees. Transfer today and your returns start tomorrow. This is a limited window scheme closing in 48 hours. No risk involved.

label: SCAM
text: Bhai, meri ek friend hai jo Dubai mein hai, usne mujhe yeh crypto platform bataya. Maine 25,000 invest kiya aur 10 din mein 1.1 lakh nikala. Aap bhi try karo. Sirf is link se app download karo aur account mein 20,000 transfer karo. Main personally help karunga. Family ko baad mein batana.

label: SCAM
text: Hello, I am Colonel Rajesh Sharma, posted in Siachen. I found your profile on Facebook and I like your personality. I am retiring next year and have 40 lakh rupees in Army savings that I need to transfer out. Can you help me by providing your account details? I will share the money with you equally.

label: SCAM
text: Main PM Kisan Samman Nidhi office se bol raha hoon. Aapka 6,000 rupaye ka installment stuck hai technical error ki wajah se. Release ke liye abhi apna bank account number, IFSC code, aur Aadhaar number verify karein. Ek OTP aayega use bhi share karein, amount seedha account mein aa jayegi.

label: SCAM
text: This is Ujjwala Yojana helpdesk. The government has approved an additional LPG subsidy of 3,200 rupees for your account. To credit this amount please verify your Aadhaar number, bank account, and share the OTP sent to your mobile. Offer valid today only.

label: SCAM
text: Main AIIMS emergency ward se bol raha hoon. Aapke ghar ka ek member yahan admit hai aur immediate surgery required hai. 50,000 rupaye advance mein bhejein is account mein abhi warna surgery hold kar li jayegi. Baad mein reimbursement hoga. Turant transfer karein.

label: SCAM
text: Hi, main aapke bank ke fraud prevention team se hoon. Aapke account mein ek unauthorized transaction block ki gayi hai. Use permanently cancel karne ke liye ek OTP aapke phone par aa raha hai, use hamare officer ko share karein. Yeh sirf verification ke liye hai, koi transaction nahi hogi.

label: SCAM
text: This is NPCI security team. A fraudulent UPI transaction of 45,000 rupees is pending on your account. To reject and reverse it, share the OTP that will arrive on your phone within the next 30 seconds. Do this quickly before the transaction completes. Do not share with anyone else.

label: SCAM
text: Aapne humari loan app se 5000 rupaye liye the. Outstanding amount interest ke saath ab 47,000 ho gaya hai. Aaj tak nahi diya toh aapki morphed photos aapke sab contacts ko bhej denge aur aapke office mein bhi call karenge. Abhi NEFT karein warna legal action se bhi zyada bura hoga.

label: SCAM
text: You borrowed Rs 8,000 from our app last month. Your account is now overdue by 94,000 rupees including penalty. We have accessed your contact list and photos. Pay immediately or we will message your entire contact list and post your details on social media. This is your final notice.

label: SCAM
text: Main FedEx India se bol raha hoon. Aapka ek international package Dubai se aaya hai jisme 50,000 rupaye cash aur gift items hain. Customs clearance ke liye 4,500 rupaye fee is UPI number par bhejein. Package aaj raat hi deliver ho jayega. OTP aane par share karein.

label: SCAM
text: This is Blue Dart courier service. A package worth 2 lakh rupees sent by your relative from Canada has arrived at customs. To release it, pay a 6,000 rupee import duty and handling fee via Google Pay immediately. Provide your address and OTP for final delivery confirmation.

label: SCAM
text: Aapke bank account se terror financing ke liye funds transfer hue hain, aise CBI intelligence input mila hai. Aap abhi se digital custody mein hain. Ghar mein hi rahein, camera band karein. 4 lakh rupaye cryptocurrency mein transfer karein case close karne ke liye. Advocate se baat karna charge badhayega.

label: SCAM
text: Your electricity meter has been tampered according to our field inspection report. A criminal complaint will be filed and your connection disconnected in 2 hours unless you pay a 6,000 rupee compounding fee right now via UPI. Share your meter number and OTP for verification.

label: SCAM
text: Aapka Kotak Mahindra Bank mein KYC pending hai 6 mahine se. RBI ne strict order diya hai aise accounts freeze karne ke liye. 1 ghante mein freeze hoga. Turant apna Aadhaar, PAN, aur net banking password share karein hamare compliance officer se. OTP bhi batayein.

label: SCAM
text: Income Tax e-filing portal se yeh automated message hai. Aapka 45,000 rupaye ka refund hold pe hai kyunki bank account linking nahi hui. Abhi is helpline par call karein, Aadhaar OTP share karein, aur 24 ghante mein refund aa jayega. Aaj nahi kiya toh refund cancel ho sakta hai.

label: SCAM
text: I am Sub Inspector Dixit from cyber cell Hyderabad. Your number was used to scam an elderly woman of 3 lakh rupees. A suo motu FIR has been registered. You must appear at the station today or pay 35,000 rupees as anticipatory bail through our secure payment link. Do not delay.

label: SCAM
text: ISRO recruitment cell se aapko badhai ho. Aapka technical assistant ke liye selection hua hai. Salary 62,000 per month. Joining se pehle 18,000 rupaye background verification fee jama karni hogi is account mein. Payslip aur ID card 3 working days mein milega. Confidential rakhein abhi.

label: SCAM
text: NCB zonal officer bol raha hoon. Aapke naam par ek drug courier ne delivery ki hai jiski CCTV footage humare paas hai. Case bandh karne ke liye 1,20,000 rupaye settlement bhejein. AnyDesk install karein aur 6 digit code share karein taaki hum documents process karein.

label: SCAM
text: Your Max Life Insurance policy bonus of 8.4 lakh rupees has been approved. To release the amount today we need a 9,500 rupee GST payment from your side. Share PAN, Aadhaar, bank account number, and the OTP we send. This is a one-time claim, do not delay.

label: SCAM
text: Sir, TradeFast platform par daily 3% return guaranteed hai. Hamari team 24x7 trading karti hai. Sirf 10,000 rupaye se shuru karein. 30 din mein 19,000 milenge. 500 se zyada log already earning kar rahe hain. Aaj join karo toh special bonus bhi milega. Sirf 5 slots bache hain.

label: SCAM
text: Your Aadhaar has been linked to 3 SIM cards issued in Bihar that were used for cybercrime. UIDAI will suspend your Aadhaar in 2 hours. To stop this, call back immediately, pay 800 rupees de-linking fee and verify your OTP with our officer. Ignore at your own risk.

label: SCAM
text: Aapke khilaf ek High Court mein consumer case file hua tha jiska aapko pata bhi nahi tha. 1.8 lakh ka decree pass ho gaya hai. Recovery agent aapke ghar kal aayega. Abhi 60,000 rupaye out-of-court settlement bhejo toh case withdraw ho jayega aur koi nahi aayega.

label: SCAM
text: Hello dear, I am Priya, working in Singapore fintech company. I have a trading signal group that made me 12 lakh profit last quarter. I want to share this strategy with you. Just deposit 25,000 into this exchange wallet. I will guide you personally. Please keep this between us for now.

label: SCAM
text: RBI Governor office se yeh special message hai. India ke top 5000 taxpayers ko 2 lakh e-Rupee bonus diya ja raha hai digital adoption ke liye. Aap select hue hain. 500 rupaye verification fee bhejo aur Aadhaar OTP share karo. Amount 24 ghante mein credit hoga.

label: SCAM
text: Do you remember the video call you received two days ago from an unknown number? We recorded that session. Your face is clearly visible in compromising content. Pay 60,000 rupees to this account in the next 2 hours or we go live on Instagram and send to your contacts.

label: SCAM
text: ED officer speaking. Your PAN card has been flagged in a 2 crore money laundering investigation. You are named as an accused. To cooperate with the investigation and avoid arrest, transfer 1.5 lakh rupees to the ED escrow account today. This is your chance to settle before the media finds out.

label: SCAM
text: Namaskar, main aapke Canara Bank ke branch manager Mehta bol raha hoon. Aapke account mein 1.2 lakh rupaye ki fraudulent RTGS aai hai. Use return karne ke liye aapko abhi apna ATM card number, expiry, aur OTP share karna padega. Sirf 10 minute ka window hai.

label: SCAM
text: Ayushman Bharat helpline se call kar raha hoon. Aapka 5 lakh ka health insurance card ban gaya hai. Card activate karne ke liye 500 rupaye activation fee bhejein aur Aadhaar OTP share karein. Card 24 ghante mein speed post se aayega. Aaj last date hai.

label: SCAM
text: Aapki passport renewal application mein photo mismatch mili hai. Application reject hone ki naubat aa gayi hai. Reject hone se bachne ke liye 2,800 rupaye urgent processing fee bhejein is number par aur Aadhaar OTP share karein. Kal tak passport dispatch ho jayega.

label: SCAM
text: Main Paytm fraud team se hoon. Aapke wallet se 12,000 rupaye withdraw hone wale hain unauthorized transaction se. Use rokne ke liye abhi hum ek OTP bhej rahe hain, use hamare officer ko bataiye. Yeh transaction verification nahi, reversal ke liye hai. Jaldi karein.

label: SCAM
text: QuickCash app se final warning. Aapne 12,000 rupaye ka loan liya tha. Ab 1,08,000 due hai penalty ke saath. Aapke sab contacts ko aaj shaam tak message jayega. Aapke boss ko bhi WhatsApp karenge. Abhi pay karo toh sab rok sakte hain. 2 ghante ka time hai.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Congratulations! You have been selected for a special cashback of 5,000 rupees from your credit card company. To claim this offer, verify your 16-digit card number and expiry date. This offer is valid only for the next 24 hours and cannot be extended.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Sir, aapka Aadhaar kisi ne misuse kiya hai. Aapko turant UIDAI helpline par call karna chahiye aur apna OTP share karke details verify karni chahiye. Agar aaj nahi kiya toh Aadhaar suspend ho sakta hai. Kripya apna registered number confirm karein.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hello, I am calling about an exclusive mutual fund scheme with guaranteed 18% annual returns. This is a private placement closing tomorrow. Minimum investment is 50,000 rupees. Only 5 slots left. Transfer the amount today to lock in the rate. SEBI-registered company.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Main aapke bank se bol raha hoon. Aapke account mein unusual login attempt detect hua hai. Security ke liye aapko apna registered mobile number aur date of birth confirm karna hoga. Verification hone ke baad hum further details share karenge.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: We are offering work from home data entry jobs with daily payment. Earn 1,500 to 3,000 rupees per day doing simple tasks online. To get started, register on our app and pay a one-time 799 rupee membership fee. Tasks will be assigned within 24 hours. Very limited seats.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hello sir, I am calling regarding your recent credit card transaction. We noticed a suspicious payment of 8,500 rupees that may not have been authorised by you. To investigate further, please confirm your card number and date of birth. This is to protect your account.

label: SUSPICIOUS
scam_type: too good to be true offer
text: Sir aapka naam PM Awas Yojana waiting list mein tha aur ab aapka number aa gaya hai. 2BHK flat sirf 1.5 lakh mein milega Noida extension mein. Abhi 8,000 rupaye booking token dein, documents baad mein submit honge. Scheme close hone wali hai jaldi karein.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hello, your cousin Rahul asked me to call you. He has met with a small accident and needs 10,000 rupees for the hospital. His phone is broken so he cannot call you directly. Please transfer the amount to this account and he will return it as soon as he is better.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Aapka mobile number Amazon Great Indian Sale lucky draw mein select hua hai. Aap 15,000 rupaye ka shopping voucher jeet sakte hain. Claim karne ke liye apna full name, date of birth, aur registered email address confirm karein. Offer sirf aaj valid hai.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: This is an important message about your vehicle insurance renewal. Your current policy is expiring soon and you may lose your no-claim bonus. Call us back on this number within today for a special renewal offer and 30% discount. Limited time, don't miss out.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Sir, we have received a complaint against you from a financial institution. The matter is serious and requires your immediate attention. Please call back on this number before 5 PM today to understand the nature of the complaint and resolve it before it escalates further.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Main aapke mobile service provider ki taraf se bol raha hoon. Aapka KYC update pending hai aur SIM block ho sakti hai. Verification ke liye sirf apna full name aur Aadhaar number share karein. Koi OTP ya bank details nahi chahiye. Sirf basic verification hai.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Congratulations! As a loyal customer you have been selected for a flat 60% discount on your next health insurance premium. To avail this offer, share your existing policy number and date of birth for verification. Offer expires this Sunday.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hello, we are conducting a brief 2-minute survey for a government digital welfare scheme. If you complete it, you will receive 500 rupees cashback. We just need your name, Aadhaar last 4 digits, and bank account number to process the reward. It is completely free.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Aapka Flipkart account 5 saal purana ho gaya hai aur aap Loyalty Gold status ke liye select hue hain. 3,000 rupaye ka credit aapke wallet mein add karne ke liye apna registered email aur date of birth confirm karein. Offer 48 ghante tak valid hai.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Sir, ek government-backed gold bond scheme aa gayi hai jisme 12% annual return guaranteed hai. Sirf 1 lakh ki minimum investment chahiye. Scheme 3 din mein close ho rahi hai. Abhi account details bhejo taaki hum form submit kar sakein. SEBI approved hai.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hello, we are a digital marketing company looking for people to like and share posts on Instagram and YouTube. Payment is 200 rupees per task, daily payout. To join, complete a 499 rupee one-time training fee. After that tasks start immediately. Very flexible hours.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hi, I am Dr. Malhotra's assistant from Fortis Hospital. Your family member had given your number as an emergency contact. There is a small procedural fee pending. Could you confirm the patient's date of birth and relationship before we discuss further details?

label: SUSPICIOUS
scam_type: too good to be true offer
text: Sir aapko ek 5-star resort mein 3 nights free vacation mil rahi hai ek lucky draw mein. Sirf 2,000 rupaye ka refundable processing fee bhejein aur package book ho jayega. Dates aap khud choose kar sakte hain. Yeh offer sirf selected customers ke liye hai.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: This is from the SBI credit card team. We want to upgrade your card to the Platinum tier free of cost. For the upgrade, please confirm your current credit limit, card expiry date, and the last 4 digits of your card. No charges will be applied.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Aapke naam se ek loan application submit ki gayi hai kisi ne. Agar yeh aapne nahi ki toh abhi hamare number par call karein warna loan approve ho jayega aur aap legally liable ho sakte hain. Jaldi karo, processing 2 ghante mein complete hogi.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hello, this is a security alert from your UPI service provider. Your UPI ID was used to make a payment from an unregistered device. If this was not you, press 1 to freeze your UPI account. Please confirm your registered mobile number and UPI PIN to reverse the transaction.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: You have been shortlisted for a brand ambassador program by a leading FMCG company. The role pays 40,000 per month part time. To confirm your selection, share your full name, city, qualification, and a passport-size photo on this WhatsApp number before tomorrow.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Main ek private bank se home loan ke baare mein baat karna chahta tha. Aapne kuch time pehle inquiry ki thi online. Hamari special offer mein 6.5% interest rate par loan available hai. Call back karein aaj taaki hum application process karein. Documents bhi ready rakhein.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: This is Jio KYC verification team. Your SIM will be blocked in 24 hours if KYC is not updated. To update, share your Aadhaar number and we will send a link to your phone. Click the link and enter basic details. No OTP sharing is required. Just a quick 2-minute process.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Aap LIC ke purane customer hain isliye aapko gold plan mein free upgrade mil rahi hai bina extra premium ke. Bas apni policy number aur date of birth confirm karein. Upgrade ke baad aapko ek gift hamper bhi milega. Offer kal tak valid hai.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hello, we are conducting a quick government survey on digital banking awareness. If you answer 5 questions, you will receive 1,000 rupees cashback directly in your account. First question: do you currently use net banking? Please also confirm your bank name.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Aapka UPI number ek exclusive merchant rewards program mein add hua hai. Aap 2,500 cashback ke liye eligible hain. Claim karne ke liye apna UPI ID aur linked bank account confirm karein. Amount 3 working days mein credit ho jayega. Koi charge nahi hai.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hello sir, we are launching an IPO for a new green energy company next week. Pre-IPO allocation is available for a limited number of investors at a 40% discount to the issue price. Minimum 25,000 rupees. Reply today to reserve your slot before it fills up.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Ghar se kaam karein aur 2,000 se 4,000 rupaye roz kamayein. Sirf mobile app par kuch products review karne hain aur star rating deni hai. Registration ke liye 599 rupaye ek baar bhejein. Kaam agla din se start ho jayega, daily payment guaranteed.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hi, I found your number through a common friend. I am starting a small business and need a short-term loan of 30,000 rupees for 2 weeks. I will return 35,000. I can show you my Aadhaar and PAN for trust. Please let me know if you can help.

label: SUSPICIOUS
scam_type: too good to be true offer
text: Sir, aapko ek pre-approved personal loan ka offer hai 10 lakh ka bina kisi document ke, sirf Aadhaar se. Interest rate sirf 4% annual. Loan 2 ghante mein account mein. Bas apna Aadhaar number aur bank account number share karein is WhatsApp par.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hello, I am calling from CIBIL score improvement service. Your credit score can be raised from 650 to 800 in 30 days. To check your current score and start the process, please share your PAN card number and date of birth. There is no charge for the initial check.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Yeh ek final reminder hai. Aapke account se ek pending matter hai jo resolve nahi hua hai. Agar aap aaj se pehle call nahi karte toh hum legal proceedings shuru kar denge. Zyada detail ke liye hamare helpline par callback karein as soon as possible.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: This is a survey from a leading telecom company. We want to know your opinion on our new 5G plans. If you complete the survey, you get 3 months of free premium service. First, confirm your current mobile number and the plan you are on right now.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Main BHIM UPI helpdesk se bol raha hoon. Aapka UPI limit upgrade request pending hai. Upgrade ke liye aapko sirf apna registered mobile number aur account number confirm karna hai. No OTP is required. Process 10 minutes mein complete hogi.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hello! Your phone number was selected from Blinkit's customer database for a mystery gift box worth 4,500 rupees. To dispatch the gift, please confirm your full delivery address and date of birth for identity verification. Delivery within 3 to 5 working days.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Sir aap Vodafone ke valued customer hain. Aapka KYC 2019 se update nahi hua hai. RBI guideline ke hisab se update karna mandatory hai. Sirf apna Aadhaar number batayein, baaki sab hum verify kar lenge. OTP ya bank details bilkul nahi chahiye.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: We are a real estate investment platform. For only 5,000 rupees you can co-own a commercial property in Pune and earn monthly rent of 800 to 1,200 rupees. This is a RERA-registered project. Offer closing this Friday. Register today on our website and pay online.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Aapne 3 mahine pehle hamare online store par kuch products browse kiye the. Wo products abhi heavy discount par available hain. Sirf aaj aur kal ka offer hai. Callback karein toh hum order place karne mein help karenge. Delivery free hogi.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Your Google Pay account has been selected for a cashback bonus of 2,000 rupees as part of our anniversary offers. To receive this, verify your UPI PIN by entering it on the link we just sent. This is a one-time process. Bonus credited within 24 hours.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Dear candidate, your resume was shortlisted for an online content moderation role. Work from home, 4 hours daily, pay is 18,000 per month. A 1,200 rupee background check fee is required before we process your offer letter. Pay and submit receipt to HR.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hello uncle, main Amit bol raha hoon, Sharma ji ka beta. Papa ne bola aapse baat karoo. Unhe achanak hospital mein admit kiya hai aur abhi cash chahiye 20,000 ka. Unka phone dead hai. Please is number par transfer kar do, main kal wapas kar dunga.

label: SUSPICIOUS
scam_type: too good to be true offer
text: Sir, ek MLM company join karein aur 5 lakh rupaye mahine kamayein. Koi product nahi bechna. Sirf 5 log join karao network mein aur commission milta rahega. Registration ke liye 2,500 rupaye ek baar bhejein. Join karne ke baad training material milega.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: This call is from your health insurance provider. Your claim for last month's hospital visit was partially processed. To release the remaining 12,000 rupees, we need you to confirm your policy number and hospital bill reference number. Please have those handy.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Hello! Aap Amazon Prime ke 3 saal puraane member hain isliye aapko 1 saal ki free membership aur 2,000 rupaye shopping credit mil raha hai. Claim karne ke liye apna Prime account email aur password share karein hamare verification team ko.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: This message is regarding a financial dispute filed against your name in the consumer court. The case number is CC-4821/2024. Please respond within 48 hours or an ex-parte order may be passed. For details and to submit your response, call the given number.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Namaskar, hum ek NGO ki taraf se research kar rahe hain. Hamare 3-minute survey mein bhag lein aur 500 rupaye paayein. Questions hain aapki income, savings, aur financial planning ke baare mein. Responses strictly confidential rahenge. Abhi start karein.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Aapka Swiggy Money wallet 6 mahine se inactive hai. Account deactivate ho sakta hai. Reactivate karne ke liye apna registered mobile number aur date of birth confirm karein is IVR par. Process free hai aur 2 minute mein complete hogi.

label: SUSPICIOUS
text: Dear customer, you won a Bose headphone worth 25,000 rupees in our recent online quiz that you participated in. To courier your prize, please share your complete address with PIN code and a photo ID proof via WhatsApp. Delivery expected within 7 working days.

label: SAFE
text: Hello, this is a reminder from HDFC Bank. Your EMI of 8,200 rupees for your personal loan is due on the 10th of this month. You can pay via the HDFC Bank app, net banking, or visit your nearest branch. For queries, please call our official 24x7 helpline. We will never ask for your PIN or OTP.

label: SAFE
text: Aapka Flipkart order number FK987654321 dispatch ho gaya hai. Expected delivery 2 se 3 working days mein hogi. Order track karne ke liye Flipkart app use karein. Koi issue ho toh customer care 1800-208-9898 par call karein. Dhanyawad Flipkart par shopping karne ke liye.

label: SAFE
text: This is a courtesy call from Max Healthcare. Your MRI appointment is confirmed for tomorrow at 3:30 PM at our Saket branch. Please bring your doctor's referral letter and any previous reports. Arrive 15 minutes early for registration. We will not ask for any payment over the phone.

label: SAFE
text: Main aapke ghar ke paas wale Axis Bank ATM se bol raha hoon — actually ATM maintenance team se call aa rahi hai. Kal subah 6 baje se 9 baje tak ATM service unavailable rahegi scheduled maintenance ke liye. Nearest alternative ATM MG Road par hai. Inconvenience ke liye khed hai.

label: SAFE
text: This is an automated SMS from IRCTC. Your train ticket PNR 4567891230 for Rajdhani Express from Delhi to Mumbai on 20th July is confirmed in 2A class. Please carry a valid government photo ID during travel. Download the IRCTC Rail Connect app for digital ticket access.

label: SAFE
text: Namaskar, yeh reminder hai aapke LIC premium ke baare mein. Aapki policy 98765432 ka quarterly premium 3,450 rupaye 15 tarikh ko due hai. Aap LIC online portal, YONO SBI, ya nearest LIC office mein bhar sakte hain. Hum kabhi phone par OTP ya bank details nahi maangte.

label: SAFE
text: Hello, this is Rahul from Infosys HR team. We reviewed your application and would like to schedule a technical interview next Wednesday at 2 PM at our Electronic City campus. Please bring original copies of all documents mentioned in your application. There are no charges at any stage of our hiring process.

label: SAFE
text: Aapka BSNL broadband connection renewal successful ho gaya hai. 999 rupaye ka 3-mahine ka plan activate ho gaya jisme 100 Mbps unlimited data milega. Koi bhi technical issue ho toh 1800-180-1503 par call karein. Thank you for choosing BSNL.

label: SAFE
text: This is Apollo Pharmacy. Your prescription medicine order is ready for pickup at our Jubilee Hills store. The order will be held for 48 hours. Please carry your original prescription and valid ID. If you need home delivery, call our helpline to reschedule. Payment at counter only.

label: SAFE
text: Hello sir, main aapki housing society secretary Ramesh Gupta bol raha hoon. Agle Sunday 18 tarikh ko annual general body meeting hai. Meeting mein maintenance budget aur society ke naye rules par charcha hogi. Meeting subah 11 baje clubhouse mein hogi. Please attend karein.

label: SAFE
text: This is a feedback call from Ola. You recently took a ride from Koramangala to Whitefield. We would like to know about your experience. Could you rate the driver and ride quality on a scale of 1 to 5? Your feedback helps us maintain service standards. No payment details needed.

label: SAFE
text: Aapka Maruti Suzuki Swift ka free service appointment kal subah 9 baje Dealer workshop Janakpuri mein confirm hai. Please 10 minute pehle pahunch jaiye aur registration card saath laiye. Koi bhi query ho toh 011-43456789 par call karein. See you tomorrow.

label: SAFE
text: Hello, this is State Bank of India home loan department. Your loan of 35 lakh has been sanctioned as per your application. The sanction letter will be couriered to your registered address within 3 working days. Please visit the branch to complete document signing. Please note we never ask for OTP or card details.

label: SAFE
text: Namaskar, yeh BPCL Indane LPG ki taraf se SMS hai. Aapki cylinder booking registered ho gayi hai. Booking reference number hai 00234567. Expected delivery 3 se 5 working days mein hogi. Delivery person official ID dikhayega. Koi bhi payment pehle se online nahi karein.

label: SAFE
text: This is a reminder from your dentist Dr. Kapoor's clinic. You have an appointment scheduled for tomorrow at 4:30 PM. Please arrive 10 minutes early. If you need to cancel or reschedule, kindly inform us at least 3 hours in advance by calling our clinic number.

label: SAFE
text: Main Zomato delivery partner hoon. Aapka order number 123456 main abhi 5 minute mein deliver karne pahunch raha hoon. Main building ke bahar hoon, please gate khulwa dein ya neeche aajayein. Aapka order mujhse seedhe lenge, payment already done hai app se.

label: SAFE
text: Hello, this is an automated message from Indian Oil Corporation. Your DigiPay loyalty points of 2,340 will expire at the end of this month. You can redeem them at any Indian Oil petrol pump or use them for discounts on fuel. Visit our IOCL app for details.

label: SAFE
text: Aapke bete/beti ke school se call kar raha hoon. Kal 15 August ke upalaksha mein school mein flag hoisting ceremony subah 8 baje hogi. Sare students aur parents cordially amanit hain. Uniform mandatory hai. Refreshments serve kiye jayenge. School 10 baje regular time par bandh rahegi.

label: SAFE
text: This is Nykaa customer support. Your order for skincare products placed on 12th July has been dispatched via Delhivery courier. AWB number is 987654321. Expected delivery in 2 to 3 days. For returns or issues, visit our website or call 1800-267-8888. Thank you for shopping with us.

label: SAFE
text: Main aapke society ke maintenance contractor se bol raha hoon. Kal 9 baje se 12 baje tak aapki building mein plumbing work hogi 4th aur 5th floor mein. Paani supply 3 ghante ke liye band rahegi. Pehle se paani store kar lein. Kisi problem ke liye 9876543210 par contact karein.

label: SAFE
text: Hello, this is Kotak Mahindra Bank. Your fixed deposit of 2 lakhs placed in January 2024 is maturing next week on 15th January 2025. Please visit your branch or log in to our net banking portal to choose renewal or redemption options. Our staff will assist you.

label: SAFE
text: Aapka Air India flight AI-302 Bangalore se Delhi kal sham 6:30 baje schedule par hai. Web check-in abhi available hai official website par. Aapko airport par 2 ghante pehle pahunchna hoga. Baggage policy ke liye Air India website dekhin. Safe journey.

label: SAFE
text: This is a message from IGNOU student support. Your assignment submission for June TEE 2024 has been received and will be evaluated within 45 days. Your enrollment number is 123456789. For result updates, log in to the IGNOU portal or call the student helpline.

label: SAFE
text: Main Reliance Jio Tower installation team se bol raha hoon. Aapke area mein 5G network expansion ke liye kal survey team aayegi. Koi aapke premises mein enter nahi karega bina permission ke. Agar aapko koi concern ho toh Jio care 198 par call karein.

label: SAFE
text: Hello, this is Dr. Sharma's secretary from Manipal Hospital. Your blood test reports are ready and can be collected from the reports counter at Ground Floor between 9 AM and 6 PM. Alternatively, we can email them to your registered email address. Please bring your patient receipt.

label: SAFE
text: Aapka UAN number 100678432156 pe PF withdrawal request successful ho gayi hai. Amount 1.5 lakh rupaye aapke registered bank account mein 7 to 10 working days mein credit ho jayega. Status check karne ke liye EPFO member portal par login karein.

label: SAFE
text: This is HDFC Life Insurance. Your annual premium reminder for policy number 24567891 is due on the 20th of this month. The premium amount is 18,500 rupees. You can pay through our website, HDFC Bank net banking, or at any HDFC Life branch. We never request OTP via phone.

label: SAFE
text: Main DTDC courier ke delivery partner se bol raha hoon. Aapka parcel aaj deliver karne aaya tha lekin aap ghar par nahi the. Please next delivery attempt ke liye ek acha time batayein ya nearest DTDC office se pickup kar lein. Tracking number share kar sakta hoon.

label: SAFE
text: Hello, this is Bajaj Finserv. Your consumer durable loan EMI of 3,200 rupees is due on the 5th of next month. You can pay through the Bajaj app, net banking, or auto-debit if registered. For any queries contact our official customer care. We do not request card details or OTP over phone.

label: SAFE
text: Namaskar, Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan ki taraf se. Aapke ward ka admission Class 1 mein confirm ho gaya hai. Documents verification 12th August ko subah 9 baje principal office mein hogi. Original birth certificate, Aadhaar, aur 2 passport photos saath laiye. Koi fee phone par nahi li jayegi.

label: SAFE
text: This is a message from Meesho. Your order has been successfully delivered to your address. If you have not received it, please report within 48 hours through the Meesho app for a full refund. Thank you for shopping with us. Rate your experience on the app.

label: SAFE
text: Aapko SBI Credit Card ki taraf se yaad dilana chahte hain ki aapka outstanding balance 14,250 rupaye hai aur minimum payment 1,500 rupaye 25 tarikh tak karni hogi. Late payment se additional charges lagenge. SBI app ya internet banking se pay karein. Humse kabhi OTP nahi maanga jayega.

label: SAFE
text: Hello, I am Anjali from TCS recruitment team. Your application for the role of Software Engineer has moved to the next round. We would like to schedule an online coding assessment this Saturday at 2 PM. You will receive a link on your registered email. No fees are charged at any point.

label: SAFE
text: Main aapke nearest post office se bol raha hoon. Aapke naam par ek registered parcel aaya hai jo 15 din se unclaimed hai. Kal tak le lein warna wapas bhej diya jayega. Timings hain Monday to Saturday 10 AM to 5 PM. Koi valid ID proof saath laiye.

label: SAFE
text: This is the Passport Seva Kendra Hyderabad. Your passport application status has been updated to Printed and Dispatched. Your passport will be delivered to your registered address within 3 to 5 working days via Speed Post. You can track using your application reference number on the Passport Seva portal.

label: SAFE
text: Aapka Swiggy Instamart order confirm ho gaya hai. 23 items 20 minute mein deliver ho jayenge. Order number SI789012 hai. Delivery partner ka naam Ravi hai aur wo abhi warehouse se nih chal gaya hai. Koi issue ho toh Swiggy app mein support se baat karein.

label: SAFE
text: Hello, this is Big Basket. We are calling to confirm your grocery order scheduled for delivery tomorrow between 7 AM and 9 AM. If the time slot does not work for you, you can reschedule up to 8 PM tonight through the Big Basket app. No payment is needed over the phone.

label: SAFE
text: Main Municipal Corporation Pune se bol raha hoon. Aapka property tax assessment notice ghar par bheja gaya hai. Agar nahi mila toh corporation office visit karein ya portal par check karein. Payment online bhi ho sakti hai mcpune.gov.in par. Deadline is month ke aakhir tak hai.

label: SAFE
text: This is Indian Railways PRS counter Bangalore. Your Tatkal ticket booking for 18th July is confirmed. PNR 9876543210. The Bangalore-Chennai Express departs at 6:00 AM from KSR Bengaluru station. Please arrive 30 minutes before departure and carry valid photo ID.

label: SAFE
text: Namaskar, aapke RTO se call aa rahi hai. Aapki gaadi ka pollution certificate 10 din mein expire ho raha hai. Nearest authorized PUC center se renew karwa lein. Bina valid PUC ke challan ho sakta hai. List of centers parivahan.gov.in par available hai.

label: SAFE
text: Hello, this is Tanishq jewellery store in Phoenix Mall. We wanted to inform you that the gold bangle you had enquired about last week is now back in stock. We have kept one piece on hold for 48 hours. Please visit the store at your convenience. No advance payment is required.

label: SAFE
text: Aapka PhonePe Gold ka monthly accumulation successful ho gaya hai. 0.025 grams gold aapke PhonePe Gold wallet mein add ho gaya hai. Total balance 2.345 grams ho gaya hai. Sell ya redeem karne ke liye PhonePe app open karein aur Gold section mein jaaein.

label: SAFE
text: This is Myntra. Your return pickup for order MN234567 is scheduled for tomorrow between 10 AM and 1 PM. Our delivery partner will pick up the item. Please keep the product in its original packaging. Refund will be processed within 5 to 7 working days after quality check.

label: SAFE
text: Main Institute of Banking Personnel Selection se bol raha hoon. Aapka IBPS PO Prelims ka call letter download ke liye ready hai. ibps.in par login karein aur admit card download karein. Exam date 12th October hai. Centre ka naam confirm karne ke liye admit card zaroor padhein.

label: SAFE
text: Hello sir, this is a courtesy call from your car insurance company New India Assurance. Your car insurance policy for your Swift Dzire is due for renewal on 25th August. You can renew online at our website, through your agent, or by visiting our nearest office. We do not collect payments via phone.

label: SAFE
text: Aapka PMJDY account mein 1,500 rupaye ki Pradhan Mantri Jan Suraksha Bima Yojana claim amount aai hai. Yeh claim aapne bank mein submit ki thi. Amount already credited hai. Koi bhi query ke liye apne nearest bank branch mein milein. Hum kabhi OTP ya PIN nahi maangte.

label: SAFE
text: This is a reminder from CAMS. Your SIP investment in HDFC Nifty 50 Index Fund of 5,000 rupees is scheduled to be debited from your account on the 1st of next month. Ensure adequate balance in your linked bank account to avoid SIP bounce charges. For queries, visit camsonline.com.

label: SAFE
text: Namaskar, yeh Unique Identification Authority of India ki taraf se SMS hai. Aapka Aadhaar card update request successfully process ho gaya hai. Updated Aadhaar card download karne ke liye myaadhaar.uidai.gov.in par jaiye. Hum kabhi kisi ko OTP phone par share karne ko nahi bolte.

label: SAFE
text: Hello, this is Lenskart. Your eyeglasses order is ready and will be delivered within 2 working days. If you would like to try them first, you can schedule a home try-on by calling our helpline. If the power is not correct, we offer free lens replacement within 30 days of purchase.

label: SAFE
text: Main KSRTC bus service se bol raha hoon. Aapka ticket Bangalore to Mysore kal subah 7 baje ki bus ke liye confirm hai. Boarding point Majestic bus stand hai. Please 30 minute pehle pahunchein. Ticket app mein ya confirmation SMS mein available hai. Safe journey.
